description_long: This guard rail features a long, rectangular top rail supported by five evenly spaced, turned baluster-style vertical posts. The material appears to be a weathered, gray stone or concrete, giving it a robust and heavy appearance suitable for urban environments. The top rail is flat and wide, with a rough, textured surface that matches the posts. Each post is thick and solid, with decorative shaping that adds a classical architectural touch. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or special end treatment. There are no visible reflective markings or additional safety features on the rail.
description: A gray, stone-like guard rail with a flat top and five decorative, solid vertical posts, featuring a rough, weathered texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail and all five decorative posts.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the rail and the thickness of the posts.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the five posts and the flat rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and post thickness.
